v0.1-beta.description:
# Armored Core 6 Archipelago — v0.1-Beta

## Features

- 300+ Weapons and gear to receive.
- Checks sent from mission clears, arenas, and mercenary ranks.

## Known Issues

- No on-screen pickup notification — check your AP client; parts show in the assembly menu
- Archive Logs is experimental (collection flags still being verified)
- Must launch through ModEngine2, not Steam directly

## Compatibility

Built and tested on **AC6 App Ver. 1.09.1** with **ModEngine 2.1.0**. Other versions may break.

## Credits

**easywsclient**, **ModEngine2**, and **Archipelago**.
v0.1-beta.title: v0.1-Beta

v0.1.1-Beta.description:
# Armored Core 6 Archipelago — v0.1.1-Beta

# v0.1.1-Beta Changes

- Fixed: Game failed to connect when hosting on archipelago.gg. The client now
  uses TLS (wss://) automatically for archipelago.gg. **No config changes needed.**

## Features
- 300+ Weapons and gear to receive.
- Checks sent from mission clears, arenas, and mercenary ranks.

## Known Issues
- No on-screen pickup notification — check your AP client; parts show in the
  assembly menu.
- Archive Logs is experimental (collection flags still being verified).
- Must launch through ModEngine2, not Steam directly.

## Compatibility
Built and tested on **AC6 App Ver. 1.09.1** with **ModEngine 2.1.0**. Other
versions may break.

## Credits

**easywsclient**, **ModEngine2**, and **Archipelago**.
v0.1.1-Beta.title: v0.1.1-Beta

v0.1.2-Beta.description:
# Armored Core 6 Archipelago — v0.1.2-Beta

# v0.1.2-Beta Changes

- Fixed: FCS and Generators not showing.
- Fixed: Items not being granted when game is not open.

## Features
- 300+ Weapons and gear to receive.
- Checks sent from mission clears, arenas, and mercenary ranks.

## Known Issues
- No on-screen pickup notification — check your AP client; parts show in the
  assembly menu.
- Archive Logs is experimental (collection flags still being verified).
- Must launch through ModEngine2, not Steam directly.
- When closing, crashing, or returning to garage from a mission causes all items gained during that mission to vanish.

## Compatibility
Built and tested on **AC6 App Ver. 1.09.1** with **ModEngine 2.1.0**. Other
versions may break.

## Credits

**easywsclient**, **ModEngine2**, and **Archipelago**.
v0.1.2-Beta.title: v0.1.2-Beta

v0.1.3-Beta.description:
# Armored Core 6 Archipelago — v0.1.3-Beta

# Changes

- Fixed: Connections to archipelago.gg sometimes not working.
- Added: Improved logging for error detection.

## Features
- 300+ Weapons and gear to receive.
- Checks sent from mission clears, arenas, and mercenary ranks.

## Known Issues
- No on-screen pickup notification — check your AP client; parts show in the
  assembly menu.
- Archive Logs is experimental (collection flags still being verified).
- Must launch through ModEngine2, not Steam directly.
- When closing, crashing, or returning to garage from a mission causes all items gained during that mission to vanish.

## Compatibility
Built and tested on **AC6 App Ver. 1.09.1** with **ModEngine 2.1.0**. Other
versions may break.

## Credits

**easywsclient**, **ModEngine2**, and **Archipelago**.
v0.1.3-Beta.title: v0.1.3-Beta
